Vanilla Celebration
Now Shipping Nationwide!
Shipping a cake requires a lot of attention to detail to ensure it arrives fresh and looks great! That’s why we have spent the past few years perfecting the shipping process. With over 25 bakeries throughout California and Texas, the #1 question I receive is: "When will you start to ship your products?" We are now thrilled to share that day has come!
